subcodes.first_line: O ye remnants of that blessed and sacred soul, his honor Samí, namesake of the Most Great Beloved! Praise be to God, they have attained their goal [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یادگارهای آن نفس مقدس مبارک جناب سمی حضرت مقصود الحمد لله بمقصود رسیدند و
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @eulogies; reminiscences, @prayer for the departed, @praise and encouragement, @martyrs and martyrdom, @exhortations and counsels
